stack.frontend: React 19, Vite, TailwindCSS 4, Shadcn UI, React Router v7, Axios, Lucide React
stack.backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB (Mongoose), Google Gemini API (@google/genai), bcryptjs, jsonwebtoken, multer, pdf-parse, zod (for schema validation)

architecture: Feature-based module separation on frontend, MVC-like on backend.

Backend/src/.middleware/: auth.middleware.js (JWT validation), file.middleware.js (multer config for resume PDF uploads).

Frontend/src/.components/ui/: Reusable Shadcn UI components (button, card, input, label, textarea).
Frontend/src/.features/auth/: Auth context, hooks (useAuth), protected routes (Protected.jsx), login/register pages, API calls.
Frontend/src/.features/interview/: Report context, hooks (useInterviewReport), components (ResumeUploader, BehavioralQuestionsPanel, RoadMapPanel, TechnicalQuestionsPanel), pages (HomePage, InterviewReportPage).

Auth.POST /api/users/register: Registers a new user and returns JWT.
Auth.POST /api/users/logout: Logs out user and blacklists token.

Interview.POST /api/interview/: Uploads resume (PDF) & descriptions, calls Gemini AI, generates report, saves to DB.
Interview.GET /api/interview/report/interview/:int: Fetches a specific generated interview report by ID.
Interview.GET /api/interview/report/interview: Fetches all interview reports for the authenticated user.

frontend_routes./: HomePage (Protected) - Upload resume and details to generate a report.
frontend_routes./interview-report/:reportId: InterviewReportPage - Displays generated report with tabs for Technical, Behavioral, Roadmap, etc.

state_management.AuthContext: Stores current user state, auth token, and authentication loading states.
state_management.InterviewReportContext: Stores the currently fetched interview report and handles loading states during generation.

key_flows.Authentication: User submits credentials -> Backend validates, signs JWT -> Frontend saves JWT and sets user in AuthContext.
key_flows.Report_Generation: User uploads PDF resume & texts on HomePage -> Backend parses PDF with pdf-parse -> AI Service uses Gemini to map resume to job desc via Zod schema -> JSON saved in MongoDB -> User redirected to /interview-report/:reportId.
